title: Todd Greer: 'The Most Radical Idea in Business Isn't Disruption. It's Integrity.'
summary: Todd Greer, Executive Director of Innovation Portal, writes a detailed LinkedIn review of Incorruptible.
blockquote: This is not a book about bad actors. It's a book about hidden forces that cause even great organizations to drift from their values, and how to design businesses that can withstand that pressure. Ries reframes corporate governance — a term that usually makes founders' eyes glaze over — as a creative act, not a compliance exercise.
